title: trasus paniceus
intro: Trasus paniceus, also known as Tragus, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Asclepiadaceae. It is a herbaceous perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and it is valued for its ability to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Trasus paniceus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
